---
name: Roadmap to v0.2
about: Track the post-launch product roadmap.
title: "Roadmap to v0.2"
labels: roadmap
---

## Goal

Turn the v0.1 professional demo into a stronger open-source reference implementation for MCP-driven trading operations.

## Candidate Work

- Production adapter examples for FIX logs, OMS APIs, monitoring events, and approval systems.
- Live read-only demo deployment.
- MCP client examples beyond the local console.
- More evidence exports for incident replay and compliance review.
- Scenario authoring workflow for new desks and microservice incidents.

## Launch Constraint

Do not add new tools before the v0.1 story is easy to install, watch, and understand.
